variant: r1-split-gate (ASM-0421 shape+entity-gated / rel-label descriptive; ASM-0422 no judge re-roll; FK-NLB-10 in-scope covered-only sample)
sample_rule: deterministic round-robin over the 7 FK-NLB-10 in-scope covered families in eval appearance order (unique-mother, unique-father, children-lookup, count-maker, part-lookup, instance-true, instance-false-disjoint), first 60 items; the first 4 per family (28 items) coincide with the original 60-item audit sample and are MECHANICALLY RE-SCORED from the committed judge transcript; the remaining 32 NEW items were judged by a fresh blind identity (skipping already-judged qids, ASM-0422).

descriptive_strict_recovery.note: rel-label recovery is DESCRIPTIVE under ASM-0421 (gating on it would re-impose label-verbatim authoring FK-NLB-8 removed and double-count the synonym penalty the experiment measures). Rel misses are the natural-synonym phrasings authors used freely.

original_audit_ref: data/nlb-phrasings-l3a/audit-recoverability.json (sha256 d6365bd95e7d61a1cce7585bb446aa8f905b2b8eec08d0756a446e2e70a09bf5) stays committed as the driving evidence (strict 43/60, shape+entity ceiling 52/60 over the ORIGINAL all-family sample that surfaced the finding).
match_rule: shape==exact; entity case/hyphen/space-insensitive (substring-tolerant); rel/concept up-to-inflection stem-overlap (descriptive)
